faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your trip
faq.q1: How do I book a tour?
faq.a1: You can book directly on our website by clicking the "Explore Details" button on any tour and then filling out the reservation form. No prepayment is required.
faq.a2: You can cancel your tour free of charge up to 24 hours before the start. Please notify us via email or WhatsApp.
faq.q3: Are the tours private or group?
faq.a3: We offer both! Most of the prices listed are for private tours, but we can also organize group trips for larger teams upon request.

bookForm.title: Student Registration Form
bookForm.errorNotLoggedIn: Please log in with Google to submit the form.
bookForm.loginPrompt: For reserve, please log in with your Google Account. If you don't have an account, please contact us on social networks for more information.
bookForm.commentsPlaceholder: e.g. Vegetarian food, child car seat, pickup address, or flight details...

bookForm.errorAgreeToTerms: You must agree to the terms and conditions before submitting the form.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.description: Plan your next adventure with ArmeniaJourney. Tours, hotels, taxis — all in one place!
contact_page.sub_description: We provide country-wide travel services, airport transfers, hotel bookings, and all-inclusive packages.
contact_page.form_intro: Fill out the form below and we’ll help you plan your perfect trip.
contact_page.name: Name
contact_page.modal_body: We will get back to you within 1-2 workdays.
contact_page.error_send: Error sending message. Please try again.

faq.faq_q1: Do I need a visa to book a tour?
faq.faq_a1: It depends on your destination. Our managers will consult you free of charge on all visa-related questions and help you prepare the documents.
faq.faq_q2: How can I pay for the trip?
faq.faq_a2: We accept card payments via a secure gateway, bank transfers, or cash at our office.
faq.faq_a3: Yes, cancellation is possible up to 48 hours before the tour starts with no penalty.
faq.faq_q4: Is food included in the price?
faq.faq_a4: It depends on the tour — the details are listed in the description of each tour.
faq.faq_q5: How many people are in a group tour?
faq.faq_a5: Our group tours usually include 6 to 15 people, making them comfortable and personal.

hotels_page.hero_subtitle: We don't just list hotels—we curate them. Book through our experts to get exclusive rates and 24/7 concierge support during your stay.
hotels_page.why_1_text: We negotiate directly with hotel owners to provide you with rates lower than public booking sites.
hotels_page.why_2_text: Every hotel in our list is personally checked by our team for cleanliness, service, and comfort.
hotels_page.why_3_text: We are based in Yerevan. If any issue arises, we are just a WhatsApp message away to fix it.
hotels_page.trust_text: Booking a hotel in a new country can be tricky. We act as your local partner, ensuring that what you see in the photos is what you get in reality. No hidden fees, no booking stress.
hotels_page.form_pref_text: Prefer an instant answer? Most clients text us on WhatsApp.

hotels_page.contact_expert_title: Skip the form — text us directly

faq.faq_1_q: Is airport transfer included in the booking?
faq.faq_1_a: We can arrange a private transfer from Zvartnots Airport directly to your hotel at a special rate for our clients. Please mention this in your request.
faq.faq_2_q: How do I pay for my stay?
faq.faq_2_a: In most cases, you pay directly at the hotel upon arrival or departure. We act as your booking agent to secure the best local rates and guaranteed availability.
faq.faq_3_a: Cancellation policies vary by hotel. However, booking through us often gives you more flexibility. We will provide the specific terms for your chosen hotel before finalizing.
faq.faq_4_q: Are there discounts for large groups?
faq.faq_4_a: Yes! For groups of more than 10 people or long-term stays (7+ nights), we negotiate individual corporate rates that are lower than public prices.

hero.title: The History of Armenia
hero.subtitle: A journey through one of the world's oldest civilizations

intro.title: A Land of Ancient Heritage
intro.text: Armenia is one of the oldest countries in the world, with a history that spans thousands of years. From powerful ancient kingdoms to cultural and spiritual milestones, Armenia has preserved its identity through centuries of change.

urartu.title: Kingdom of Urartu
urartu.text: Between the 9th and 6th centuries BC, the Kingdom of Urartu rose in the Armenian Highlands. It built powerful fortresses, advanced irrigation systems, and laid the foundations of Armenian statehood and culture.

christianity.title: First Christian Nation
christianity.text: In 301 AD, Armenia became the first country in the world to adopt Christianity as a state religion. This decision shaped the nation's identity, architecture, and spiritual heritage for centuries.

medieval.title: Medieval Armenia
medieval.text: During the Middle Ages, Armenia flourished as a center of culture, education, and trade. Magnificent monasteries, stone churches, and illuminated manuscripts became symbols of national resilience.

modern.title: Modern Armenia
modern.text: After centuries of challenges, Armenia regained independence in 1991. Today, it stands as a proud nation that carefully preserves its ancient traditions while moving confidently toward the future.

hero.title: Armenian Cuisine
hero.subtitle: A taste shaped by fire, mountains, and centuries of tradition.

intro.title: More Than Food
intro.text: Armenian cuisine is not just about dishes — it is about family, hospitality, and sharing. Recipes have been passed from generation to generation, preserving authentic flavors and techniques.

khorovats.title: Khorovats
khorovats.text: Traditional Armenian barbecue cooked over open flame. Juicy, smoky, and served during celebrations and gatherings.

lavash.title: Lavash
lavash.text: Thin traditional bread baked in a tonir oven. Recognized by UNESCO as intangible cultural heritage.

dolma.title: Dolma
dolma.text: Grape leaves stuffed with meat, rice, and aromatic herbs. A perfect balance of flavor and tradition.

gata.title: Gata
gata.text: Sweet layered pastry with delicate filling. A symbol of Armenian warmth and hospitality.

experience.title: Experience the Armenian Table
experience.text: A traditional Armenian table is generous and welcoming. Meals are long, conversations are warm, and guests are always treated like family.

hero.title: Armenian Culture
hero.subtitle: A heritage shaped by faith, art, music, and centuries of resilience.

dance.title: Traditional Dance & Music
dance.text: Armenian dances reflect strength, unity, and celebration. Each movement tells a story of mountains, warriors, and community spirit passed down through generations.

crafts.title: Carpets & Handicrafts
crafts.text: Handwoven carpets and traditional crafts represent symbols, stories, and regional identity. Every ornament carries meaning rooted in history.

architecture.title: Sacred Architecture
architecture.text: Ancient monasteries and stone churches define the Armenian landscape. Their minimalist yet powerful design reflects spiritual depth and timeless beauty.

art.title: Manuscripts & Fine Arts
art.text: Illuminated manuscripts and classical art preserved knowledge, faith, and identity. Armenian calligraphy and miniature painting remain cultural treasures.

hero.title: Nature of Armenia
hero.subtitle: Mountains, lakes, forests, and landscapes untouched by time.

mountains.title: Majestic Mountains
mountains.text: Armenia is a land of highlands and dramatic peaks, offering breathtaking views and unforgettable hiking experiences.

lakes.title: Crystal Lakes
lakes.text: Lake Sevan and alpine waters reflect the sky and create peaceful escapes surrounded by nature.

forests.title: Green Forests
forests.text: Dense forests provide fresh air, wildlife, and hidden trails waiting to be explored.

canyons.title: Wild Canyons
canyons.text: Deep gorges and rock formations reveal the raw beauty shaped by centuries of natural forces.

final.title: Discover Untouched Beauty
final.text: From sunrise over the mountains to sunset by the lakes, Armenia’s nature offers serenity and adventure in equal measure.

hero.title: About Our Company
hero.subtitle: Creating meaningful journeys across Armenia with professionalism and care.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Our mission is to provide authentic, safe, and unforgettable travel experiences. We combine local knowledge with international service standards to deliver excellence.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.text: We operate with responsibility, precision, and attention to every detail.

trust.title: Trust & Transparency
trust.text: Clear communication and honest pricing are the foundation of our relationships.

local.title: Local Expertise
local.text: Our deep understanding of Armenia allows us to create unique and meaningful journeys.

team.title: Our Team
team.text: Our team consists of passionate travel specialists who love Armenia and are dedicated to sharing its beauty with the world.

cta.title: Let’s Plan Your Journey
cta.text: Contact us today and allow us to create a travel experience tailored just for you.

school.title: Educational Journeys
school.subtitle: Safe, educational, and fun for any class.
school.feat1_text: Licensed drivers and comfortable buses for groups.
school.feat2_text: Professional guides who know how to work with children and tell stories interestingly.
school.feat3_text: Organization of lunch boxes or a full hot lunch.
school.cta_title: Planning an excursion for a class?
school.cta_text: Download our catalog of school tours or contact us for organization.
school.album_subtitle: Unique programs for school groups: from ancient history to modern ecology

faq.custom_q1: How is the price calculated for a custom tour?
faq.custom_a1: Pricing is transparent, based on mileage, vehicle class, and duration. You receive a fixed quote within hours—no hidden fees.
faq.custom_q2: Can we change the itinerary during the trip?
faq.custom_a2: Absolutely. Flexibility is our signature. Want to stay longer at a view or skip a museum? Your driver will adapt to your flow instantly.
faq.custom_a3: Yes! We love pets. Just let us know in advance so we can provide a vehicle that ensures a comfortable ride for your furry friend.
faq.custom_q4: Do you organize multi-day trips across Armenia?
faq.custom_a4: Yes, we handle everything: logistics, boutique hotel bookings, and daily activities to ensure a seamless cross-country experience.
faq.custom_q5: What if I don't know where to go?
faq.custom_a5: Tell us your interests (hiking, wine, history, or relaxation), and our experts will design 3 unique route options for you at no cost.
faq.custom_q6: Are guides available in languages other than English?
faq.custom_a6: We provide professional guides fluent in Armenian, English, Russian, French, German, and more upon request.
faq.school_q1: Are the buses safe for group transport?
faq.school_a1: Safety is our priority. Our fleet features modern safety belts, speed limiters, and drivers with over 10 years of experience with children.
faq.school_q2: Do you provide legal documentation for schools?
faq.school_a2: We handle all the paperwork. From insurance and contracts to permits for school administrations, we make the process hassle-free.
faq.school_q3: Are there free seats for teachers?
faq.school_a3: Yes, we provide 1 complimentary seat for every 10-12 students for teachers or chaperones.
faq.school_q4: Is there an educational component to the tours?
faq.school_a4: We can align our trips with the school curriculum, making history, geography, or science come alive through interactive storytelling.
faq.school_q5: How is catering handled for school groups?
faq.school_a5: We partner with certified restaurants that specialize in child-safe catering. Menus are pre-approved and account for all allergies.
faq.school_q6: What happens in case of a medical emergency?
faq.school_a6: All drivers are trained in basic first aid, and our routes are planned with proximity to medical centers in mind for complete peace of mind.

hero.subtitle: From airport pickup to the best hotel and gastro discoveries.

services.food_desc: Top restaurant bookings and authentic lunches.

details.hotel_text: We personally checked hundreds of hotels to offer you only the best.

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.q1: Is the initial quote free of charge?
faq.a1: Yes, absolutely. We create a personalized itinerary and price calculation for you within 24 hours at no cost and with no obligation to book.
faq.q2: Can I change the hotels or activities in the package?
faq.a2: Of course. The 'All-in-One' package is fully flexible. We can swap hotels, adjust the tour intensity, or add specific gastro-locations based on your preferences.
faq.q3: What exactly is included in the 'VIP Transfer'?
faq.a3: It includes airport meet-and-greet and all internal travel during your stay in business-class vehicles with professional drivers. Fuel, parking, and water are always included.
faq.q4: How do I pay for the services?
faq.a4: We offer flexible payment terms. Usually, a small deposit is required to secure bookings, and the rest can be paid upon arrival or via bank transfer.

group_eco_tours.hero_subtitle: Choose your path: Save nature or Explore culture
group_eco_tours.all_heart_text: Each route is carefully planned by locals
group_eco_tours.all_comm_text: Join a group of like-minded travelers
group_eco_tours.eco_mission_desc: We don't just travel; we take care of the mountains we love. Join our mission.
group_eco_tours.group_perks_desc: Maximum comfort in small companies. We take care of everything.

faq.common_q1: How do I book a spot?
faq.common_a1: Click 'Join Now' and fill out the form. We will contact you shortly with further details.
faq.common_a2: We monitor the weather closely. If it's unsafe, we offer a full refund or a free reschedule.
faq.eco_about_q: Do I need any special equipment for planting/cleaning?
faq.eco_about_a: No, we provide all necessary tools, gloves, and bags. Just wear comfortable outdoor clothes.
faq.eco_a1: It involves light activity and a moderate hike. It is perfectly suitable for beginners.
faq.group_about_q: What is the maximum group size?
faq.group_about_a: We limit our group tours to a maximum of 12 people to ensure a comfortable and personalized experience.
faq.group_q1: Are meals included in the price?
faq.group_a1: Yes, traditional lunch and drinking water are included in all our group tours.

group.bring_desc: Comfortable shoes, sunglasses, and your best mood.

footer.getConnected: Get connected with us on social networks:
footer.description: Your reliable partner in discovering the hidden gems of Armenia. Premium service and authentic experiences.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions govern your access to and use of our website and services. By booking a tour or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.

sections.content: “Company”, “we”, “our” refers to the tour service provider operating this platform. “Customer” refers to any individual booking or participating in a tour. “Services” refers to all tours and related travel services offered through our website.
All bookings are subject to availability and confirmation. A booking is considered confirmed only after receiving written confirmation from us.
All prices are listed in the applicable currency and may change without prior notice. Full or partial payment may be required to confirm a booking.
Cancellation terms vary depending on the selected tour. Refund eligibility and timelines will be communicated at the time of booking.
We reserve the right to modify itineraries, schedules, or services due to operational needs, weather conditions, or safety concerns.
Customers are responsible for ensuring valid travel documents, visas, insurance, and compliance with local laws and health regulations.
The Company shall not be liable for indirect damages, personal losses, or circumstances beyond reasonable control, including force majeure events.
We are not responsible for delays or cancellations caused by events beyond our control, including natural disasters, government actions, or transportation disruptions.
These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Armenia.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our services.

sections.content: We collect personal data such as name, email address, phone number, and booking details.
Personal data is processed for contract performance, legal compliance, and legitimate business interests.
Your data is used to process bookings, communicate updates, and improve our services.
We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill contractual and legal obligations.
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data from unauthorized access.
We may share limited data with trusted partners solely for the purpose of completing bookings.
Users may request access, correction, or deletion of their personal data in accordance with applicable laws.
We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy. Any changes will be published on this page.

legal.contact_notice: For legal inquiries, please contact our support team.
